nodes.name: Weighted Hammers
nodes.description: Hammer Throw deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but hammers travels slower. | Damage +15%; Projectile Speed -10% (downside)

nodes.name: Enra's Technique
nodes.description: Hammer Throw can no longer spiral, chain, or orbit.  If your hammers would spiral, they instead deal significantly more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).  If your hammers would chain, they instead deal more critical damage for each time they would chain.  If your hammers would orbit you, they instead have additional base critical strike chance.  Hammer Throw hits deal increased damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Hit Damage +10%; Spiral -> Hit Damage +80%; Critical Multiplier Per Chain +40%; Orbit -> Base Crit Chance +4%

nodes.name: Mana Starved Forging
nodes.description: When you are out of mana Hammer Throw is free. | Out-Of-Mana Cost 0

nodes.name: Shattering Force
nodes.description: Hammer Throw hits have a chance to reduce enemy armor. | Armour Shred Chance +20%

nodes.name: Force of Impact
nodes.description: Hammer Throw deals more damage, and has a higher chance to stun enemies. | Damage +10%; Increased Stun Chance 25%

nodes.name: Collision
nodes.description: Hammer Throw deals more damage, but Hammer Throw hits no longer pierce (travel through enemies hit). Its hits have a higher chance to stun enemies, and the stuns they inflict last longer. | Damage +50%; Increased Stun Chance +60%; Increased Stun Duration +60%

nodes.name: Ricochet
nodes.description: Hammers chain to nearby enemies instead of returning to you. Hammer Throw can no longer throw extra projectiles, but it gains more damage and more attack speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers) for each extra projectile you would have thrown. | Additional Chains +1; Damage per Extra Projectile +10%; Attack Speed per Extra Projectile +10%

nodes.name: Chaining Hammers
nodes.description: Hammers chain to additional enemies. | Additional Chains +1

nodes.name: Overwhelm
nodes.description: Hammer Throw deals more hit damage against stunned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers) and the stuns they inflict last longer | More Hit Damage Vs Stunned +30%; Increased Stun Duration +30%

nodes.name: Battle Rouse
nodes.description: Hammer Throw has a chance to grant you health on hit. | Health Gained  20; Chance To Gain Health 10%

nodes.name: Winged Hammers
nodes.description: Hammers travel faster. | Projectile Speed 15%

nodes.name: Steadfast Path
nodes.description: Hammer Throw hits have a chance to deal double damage, but hammers no longer return to you. | Chance To Deal Double Damage 35%

nodes.name: Catapult
nodes.description: Hammer Throw launches additional hammers, but Hammer Throw costs more mana.  Hammers from the same throw cannot hit the same enemy, unless they spiral. | Extra Projectiles +2; Mana Cost +2 (downside)

nodes.name: Avatar of the Spire
nodes.description: Hammers are now thrown in a nova, with double the amount of additional hammers unless your hammers spiral. Hammer Throw hits deal additional throwing physical damage. | Physical Damage +12

nodes.name: Iron Spiral
nodes.description: Hammers now travel in a spiral around you, but halves your amount of additional hammers and Hammer Throw costs more mana. | Mana Cost +4 (downside)

nodes.name: Hammer Vortex
nodes.description: Your spiralling hammers now orbit you, but Hammer Throw costs more mana. | Mana Cost +4 (downside)

nodes.name: Ballista
nodes.description: Hammer Throw deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and costs less mana. | Damage +3%; Mana Cost -1

nodes.name: Zealot's Conviction
nodes.description: Hammer Throw hits have a higher chance to deal double damage. | Chance To Deal Double Damage +13%

nodes.name: Dark Duellist
nodes.description: You deal more global damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while preparing to riposte. | Global More Damage +4%

nodes.name: Rapid Strikes
nodes.description: Vengeance has increased attack speed. | Attack Speed +5%

nodes.name: Vengeful Fighter
nodes.description: Vengeance deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).  This effect is doubled if you have blocked or parried a hit recently. | Damage +6%

nodes.name: Deflection
nodes.description: Vengeance critical strikes deal more damage. | Critical Multiplier +20%

nodes.name: Executioner
nodes.description: Vengeance hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).  This effect is doubled against enemies on low health (below 35% health). | Hit Damage +10%

nodes.name: Bolster
nodes.description: You take less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased armor if you've hit an enemy with Vengeance in the past 2 seconds. | Less Damage Taken 13%; Increased Armor 25%

nodes.name: Smelter's Vengeance
nodes.description: Vengeance hits have a chance to shred enemy armor and physical resistance. | Armor Shred Chance +25%; Physical Res Shred Chance +25%

nodes.name: Molten Riposte
nodes.description: Vengeance hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed. | Bleed Chance +25%

nodes.name: Blade Paladin
nodes.description: Vengeance gains additional physical penetration with bleed per 1% overcapped physical resistance. | Physical Penetration With Bleed +1%

nodes.name: Cooling Anvil
nodes.description: Riposte deals more fire damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and its hits have a chance to ignite enemies. | Riposte Fire Damage +10%; Riposte Ignite Chance +50%

nodes.name: Vengeful Echoes
nodes.description: Vengeance deals more void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and additional melee void damage.  Additionally, Echoed Vengeance cannot be dodged. | Melee Void Damage +6; Void Damage +3%

nodes.name: Rifts of Destruction
nodes.description: Erasing Strike deals more damage over time. | Damage Over Time +15%

nodes.name: Mark of the End
nodes.description: Erasing Strike hits shred enemy void resistance. | Void Shred Chance +100%

nodes.name: Merciful
nodes.description: Erasing Strike has increased cooldown recovery speed and deals more melee damage to enemies that are already damaged (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Cooldown Recovery Speed +15%; Melee Damage vs Damaged Enemies +5%

nodes.name: Ruthless
nodes.description: Erasing Strike deals more melee damage to enemies at full health (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Melee Damage Vs Full Health Enemies +25%

nodes.name: Erasure of the Living
nodes.description: Erasing Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health). | Damage +10%; Kill Threshold 2%

nodes.name: Time Loop
nodes.description: Erasing Strike consumes mana to cause additional echoes when used. Each echo will appear one second after the last. These additional echos cannot be created while you have negative mana. | Maximum Additional Echoes +1; Mana Consumed Per Echo 60

nodes.name: Shattered Continuity
nodes.description: Erasing Strike no longer has a cooldown, but it deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage -20% (downside)

nodes.name: Chamber of Fate
nodes.description: Erasing Strike hits have a chance to slow and deals more melee damage to slowed enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Slow Chance +50%; Melee Damage to Slowed +25%

nodes.name: Obliteration
nodes.description: Erasing Strike deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).   This bonus is doubled while wielding two handed weapon. | Damage +10%

nodes.name: Prophet's Onslaught
nodes.description: Improves Erasing Strike's base critical strike chance.  Additionally, Erasing Strike's hits cannot be dodged. | Base Crit Chance +3%

nodes.name: Certain Erasure
nodes.description: Erasing Strike critical strikes deal more damage. | Critical Multiplier +25%

nodes.name: Absorb the Remains
nodes.description: When Erasing Strike kills an enemy or hits a boss or rare enemy you regain health equal to a percentage of the target's maximum health. | Health Gained On Kill 1%; Health Gained On Rare or Boss Hit 1%

nodes.name: Implements of Destruction
nodes.description: Erasing Strike deals more void damage if you are using a two handed mace (multiplicative with other modifiers).  Erasing Strike has increased cooldown recovery speed if you are using a two handed sword.  Erasing Strike's melee hit and void rifts have a larger area of effect if you are using a two handed axe. | Void Damage with 2h Mace +15%; Cooldown Recovery Speed with 2h Sword +25%; Increased Area with 2h Axe +25%

nodes.name: Twin Cataclysms
nodes.description: You can store an additional charge of Erasing Strike. | Additional Charges +1

nodes.name: Hastened Cataclysm
nodes.description: Erasing Strike has increased cooldown recovery speed, but also has a higher mana cost. | Cooldown Recovery Speed +35%; Mana Cost +15 (downside)

nodes.name: Dark Moon
nodes.description: Devouring Orb now orbits you, but has a much shorter duration (multiplicative with other duration modifiers). | Duration -50% (downside)

nodes.name: Distant Satellite
nodes.description: Devouring Orb deals more damage and orbits you at a greater distance. | Damage +5%; Orbit Range +50%

nodes.name: Abyssal Rush
nodes.description: While you are moving, you will automatically cast Devouring Orb if it is not on cooldown and you have enough mana.  This effect puts Devouring Orb on cooldown.

nodes.name: Cosmic Impact
nodes.description: Devouring Orb now deals void damage to enemies it collides with. | Void Damage on Impact 80

nodes.name: Extinction
nodes.description: Devouring Orb deals more hit damage to enemies it collides with (multiplicative with other modifiers).  This ONLY affects the damage that devouring orb deals when the orb itself collides with an enemy, not the damage dealt by its void rifts or other sub skills. | Collision Damage +40%

nodes.name: Void Adept
nodes.description: You deal more global void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased mana regen while a Devouring Orb is active.  These bonuses are doubled if you have at least 90 vitality. | Global More Void Damage 2%; Increased Mana Regen 2%

nodes.name: Fleeting Orb
nodes.description: Devouring Orb costs less mana, but has a shorter duration (multiplicative with other duration modifiers). | Mana Efficiency +35%; Duration -20% (downside)

nodes.name: Dust Channeller
nodes.description: Devouring Orb has increased cast speed and a shorter cooldown. | Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed 15%; Cast Speed +5%

nodes.name: Abyssal Expanse
nodes.description: Devouring Orb deals damage in a larger area. | Area +20%

nodes.name: Devour the Weak
nodes.description: When you directly cast non-orbiting Devouring Orb within the area of an existing Devouring Orb, the new Orb consumes all existing Orbs to deal more damage in a larger area (both multiplicative with other modifiers), per Orb consumed. However, the new Orb also deals less ailment damage per Orb consumed (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage Per Orb Consumed +100%; Area Per Orb Consumed +50%; Ailment Damage Per Orb Consumed -6% (downside)

nodes.name: Rotting Prey
nodes.description: Devouring Orb has a chance to apply frailty to enemies within its area of effect each second. | Frailty Chance Per Second +25%

nodes.name: Voidfire Rift
nodes.description: Devouring Orb gains more radius each second, up to a maximum. | Radius Each Second +3%; Max Bonus Radius 30%

nodes.name: Burning Prey
nodes.description: Devouring Orb deals more damage over time, but less hit damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage Over Time +15%; Hit Damage -10% (downside)

nodes.name: Patient Hunger
nodes.description: Devouring orb gains additional charges, but costs more mana. | Additional Charges +1; Mana Cost +3 (downside)

nodes.name: The Rending Maw
nodes.description: Devouring Orb hits have a chance to slow and shred enemy void resistance. | Void Res Shred Chance +25%; Slow Chance +25%

nodes.name: Vorpal Reverberation
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage +8%

nodes.name: Rippling Corrosion
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst shreds enemy armor. | Armor Shred Stacks 1

nodes.name: Tides of Rust
nodes.description: Armor shred applied by Abyssal Decay has increased effect. | Armor Shred Effect +20%

nodes.name: Time Compression
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes no longer has a cooldown, but costs more mana. | Mana Cost +15 (downside)

nodes.name: Abyssal Dispersion
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes costs less mana. | Mana Efficiency +20%

nodes.name: Dark Torrent
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes can now be cast at the target location.

nodes.name: Turbulence
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay has increased duration. | Abyssal Decay Duration +20%

nodes.name: Myopia
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay now blinds enemies.

nodes.name: Fragility
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay causes enemies to have reduced physical resistance, but it is no longer consumed when the enemy is hit. | Physical Resistance -10%

nodes.name: Crumbling
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay causes enemies to take increased damage over time. | Damage Over Time Taken +8%

nodes.name: Impair the Weak
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay now deals damage when the enemy is hit, rather than over time. Each hit deals a portion of the full damage Abyssal Decay would have dealt over its full duration. This damage still counts as damage over time. | Damage Portion Of Abyssal Decay 5%

nodes.name: Sanguine Eruption
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst consumes all stacks of bleed on the enemy, causing their damage to be dealt instantly.

nodes.name: Crippling Waves
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst slows enemies. | Slow Stacks +1

nodes.name: Deep Expanse
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes affects a larger area. | Area +20%

nodes.name: Fiery Chasm
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst has a chance to ignite enemies. | Ignite Chance +50%

nodes.name: Potent Corruption
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' initial burst now hits and deals spell void damage, but no longer inflicts Abyssal Decay. | Spell Void Damage On Hit 60

nodes.name: Heavenly Gift
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes' damage now scales with attunement rather than vitality, and its healing effectiveness is also increased by attunement. | Increased Healing Per Attunement 4%

nodes.name: Vorpal Explosion
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer chains. | Damage +80%

nodes.name: Spreading Chaos
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay now spreads to several nearby enemies after 1 second. | Number Of Enemies Spread To 4

nodes.name: Overwhelming Doom
nodes.description: Abyssal Decay spreads to enemies further away and can spread to more enemies when it spreads. | Spreading Distance +50%; Number Of Enemies Spread To +2

nodes.name: Corrupting Harness
nodes.description: Abyssal Echoes can chain additional times.   This effect is tripled for echoed casts. | Additional Chains +2

nodes.name: Resounding Abyss
nodes.description: Echoed casts deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Echoed Damage +30%

nodes.name: Necrotic Conviction

nodes.name: Aegis of Death
nodes.description: When one of your Skeletons dies, another Skeleton is healed to full health.

nodes.name: Unbound Necromancy
nodes.description: Summon Skeletons costs less mana, and your Skeletons have improved base critical strike chance. | Mana Efficiency +20%; Base Crit Chance +2%

nodes.name: Soul Catcher
nodes.description: You gain ward whenever one of your Skeletons dies. | Ward Gained 10

nodes.name: Mind Catcher
nodes.description: You gain mana whenever one of your Skeletons dies. | Mana Gained 5

nodes.name: Memory Catcher
nodes.description: You have increased spell damage if one of your Skeletons has died recently (past 4 seconds). | Global Increased Spell Damage +25%

nodes.name: Unholy Rage
nodes.description: Skeletons have increased attack speed, cast speed, and movement speed. | Attack Speed +7%; Cast Speed +7%; Movespeed +7%

nodes.name: Lone Guardian
nodes.description: Your Skeletons have increased critical strike chance, but you can only have one Skeleton Warrior summoned at once. | Increased Crit Chance +30%

nodes.name: Mightier than the Sword
nodes.description: Skeleton Warriors are removed from the pool of Skeletons that can be summoned.

nodes.name: Marrow Walkers
nodes.description: You can summon more Skeletons. | Maximum Number Of Skeletons +1

nodes.name: Hollow Walkers
nodes.description: You can summon more Skeletons. | Maximum Number Of Skeletons +1

nodes.name: Grave Walkers
nodes.description: You can summon more Skeletons. | Maximum Number Of Skeletons +1

nodes.name: Shambling Steel
nodes.description: Skeleton Archers are removed from the pool of Skeletons that can be summoned.

nodes.name: Dread Phalanx
nodes.description: Skeletons deal more damage and have more health (both multiplicative with other modifiers) and are larger, but you can only summon half as many as you could before (rounded up). | Damage +100%; Health +50%; Size +20%; Maximum Number Of Skeletons -50% (downside)

nodes.name: Impatience

nodes.name: Marrow Tap

nodes.name: Empty the Graves
nodes.description: You summon multiple Skeletons in a single cast, but Summon Skeleton costs more mana. This does not affect your maximum number of Skeletons. | Skeletons Summoned Per Cast +1; Mana Cost +110% (downside)

nodes.name: Sweeping Strikes
nodes.description: Skeletons have an increased area of effect with melee attacks, and your Skeletons deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Melee Area Of Effect +12%; Damage +12%

nodes.name: Skeleton Rogue
nodes.description: Adds Skeleton Rogues to the pool of Skeletons that can be summoned. Rogues dash to distant enemies, throw shurikens, use melee attacks, and they poison enemies on hit.

nodes.name: Immortal
nodes.description: When a Skeleton dies, there is a chance to summon a random new one at the same location after 3 seconds. | Skeleton Resummon Chance 10%

nodes.name: Individual Operator
nodes.description: Skeleton Rogues deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each Skeleton Warrior or Archer you control. | Rogue Damage per Skeleton Warrior or Archer +25%

nodes.name: Revile
nodes.description: Rip Blood deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage Over Time +10%

nodes.name: Gushing Wound
nodes.description: Rip Blood hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed.. | Bleed Chance +25%

nodes.name: Necrotic Unity
nodes.description: Blood Splatter has increased area for each minion you currently control, up to a maximum benefit. | Increased Area Per Minion +2%; Maximum Area Increase 40%

nodes.name: Hemomancer
nodes.description: Rip Blood has increased cast speed. | Cast Speed +6%

nodes.name: Thirst
nodes.description: Rip Blood costs less mana and has increased cast speed. | Mana Cost -1; Cast Speed +3%

nodes.name: Carrion Hunger
nodes.description: When you are out of mana Rip Blood is free. | Out-of-Mana Mana Cost  0

nodes.name: Gushing Wound
nodes.description: Rip Blood has additional critical strike chance.. | Critical Chance +3%

nodes.name: Septic Wound
nodes.description: When you directly use Rip Blood and hit a boss or rare enemy or hit at least 3 enemies, you cast Marrow Shards in the same direction.

nodes.name: Arcane Absorption
nodes.description: When you directly cast Rip Blood and hit at least one enemy you gain additional spell damage for 6 seconds. The amount of spell damage gained is doubled for Rip Blood. This effect can stack. | Global Spell Damage on Hit +1; Buff Duration (Seconds) 6

nodes.name: Run Dry
nodes.description: Rip Blood deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage +8%

nodes.name: Necrotic Inspiration
nodes.description: Rip Blood deals more damage for each minion you currently control (multiplicative with other modifiers), up to a maximum benefit. | Damage Per Minion +2%; Maximum Damage Gained +20%

nodes.name: Stench of Blood
nodes.description: Rip Blood has increased cast speed leaves a stench on the target enemy that causes your minions to prioritise attacking it. | Cast Speed +5%

nodes.name: Soul Shatter
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but Sacrifice costs more mana. | Damage +15%; Mana Cost +5% (downside)

nodes.name: Great Sacrifice

nodes.name: Altar of Flames
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals additional fire damage. | Fire Damage +6

nodes.name: Infernal Vindication
nodes.description: Sacrifice costs less mana and if you cast Sacrifice while you control at least one minion you gain a buff that grants you more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers). This buff does not stack. | Mana Efficiency +13%; Global Increased Damage Over Time +6%; Buff Duration (Seconds) 6

nodes.name: Burning Offering
nodes.description: Sacrifice has a chance to ignite enemies and ignite it inflicts has additional fire penetration. | Ignite Chance +25%; Fire Penetration with Ignite +5%

nodes.name: Punishment
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals more hit damage against bleeding enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Hit Damage Against Bleeding +15%

nodes.name: Pontifex
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals more damage for each minion you currently control (multiplicative with other modifiers), up to a maximum. | Damage Per Minion +1.5%; Maximum Damage From Minion Count 90%

nodes.name: Avatar of Decay
nodes.description: You deal increased damage over time if you have cast Sacrifice recently (past 4 seconds). You cannot have multiple instances of this buff at once. | Global Increased Damage Over Time 20%

nodes.name: Temple of Awe
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals damage in a larger area and has an increased chance to stun enemies. | Area +20%; Increased Stun Chance 20%

nodes.name: Necrotic Audience
nodes.description: Sacrifice deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area if you have three or more minions active when you cast Sacrifice. | Damage with 3+ Minions +8%; Area with 3+ Minions +30%

nodes.name: Catalyst of Horror
nodes.description: Sacrifice is recast onto other minions within its area of effect, which can happen multiple times. Sacrifice costs more mana. | Sacrifice Chain Targets 2; Mana Cost +25% (downside)

nodes.name: Sanguine Libation

nodes.name: Bone Knives
nodes.description: Marrow Shards deals significantly more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), but no longer pierces. | Damage 75%

nodes.name: Marrow Hunger
nodes.description: You leech a portion of physical damage as health if you have cast Marrow Shards recently (past 4 seconds). | Physical Leech +3%

nodes.name: Dead Weight
nodes.description: Marrow Shards deals more damage, but its range is reduced. | Damage +15%; Projectile Range -13% (downside)

nodes.name: Blood Assassin
nodes.description: Marrow Shards has additional critical strike chance and critical strike multiplier. | Crit Chance +1%; Critical Multiplier +15%

nodes.name: Marrow Death
nodes.description: Marrow Shards has additional critical strike multiplier. | Critical Multiplier +20%

nodes.name: Femoral Offering
nodes.description: Marrow Shards has additional critical strike multiplier, but you lose health when you critically strike with Marrow Shards. | Critical Multiplier +30%; Health Lost On Crit 1% (downside)

nodes.name: Ossumancy
nodes.description: When you directly cast Marrow Shards, you have a chance to immediately cast a second instance of Marrow Shards.  Indirect casts of Marrow Shards, such as from this effect, do not cost health. | Doublecast Chance +20%

nodes.name: Shredding Bones
nodes.description: Marrow Shards hits have a chance to shred enemy armor. | Armor Shred Chance +25%

nodes.name: Apathy
nodes.description: Marrow Shards deals more damage, but Marrow Shards can hit and damage your own minions.   On hit effects, such as health gained on hit, do not proc when you hit your minions. | Damage +25%

nodes.name: Treachery
nodes.description: You gain health when you kill one of your own minions. | Health Gained +10

nodes.name: Dark Reverie
nodes.description: Grants you increased critical strike chance if you have killed with Marrow Shards recently (past 4 seconds). | Global Increased Crit Chance +30%

nodes.name: Blood Reverie
nodes.description: You leech a portion of physical damage as life if you have killed with Marrow Shards recently (past 4 seconds). | Global Physical Leech +4%

nodes.name: Soul Blood
nodes.description: Marrow Shards has a chance to cause enemies to bleed, but costs more health. | Bleed Chance +25%; Health Cost +10% (downside)

nodes.name: Bones Of The Follower
nodes.description: Marrow Shards deals significantly more damage, but consumes one of your minions when you cast it. | Damage +100%

nodes.name: Demise
nodes.description: Marrow Shards deals more hit damage against bleeding enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Hit Damage Against Bleeding +20%

nodes.name: Frigid Shards

It also gains a base freeze rate.  Bleed chance from all sources is converted to frostbite chance.  Swaps Marrow Shards's physical tag for a cold tag. | Physical -> Cold +100%; Freeze Rate 50

nodes.name: Wraith Bringer
nodes.description: Summon Wraith has increased cast speed and costs less mana. | Summoning Cast Speed +10%; Summoning Mana Efficiency +10%

nodes.name: Thin Veil

nodes.name: Tethered Existence
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage when they pass through enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers), but move slower. | Damage +10%; Spirit Movespeed -10% (downside)

nodes.name: Drifting Spirits
nodes.description: Spirits are revealed in a larger radius around you. | Reveal Range +15%

nodes.name: Infectious Dead

nodes.name: Familiar Souls

nodes.name: Lingering Souls

nodes.name: Drained Will

nodes.name: Prey On Fear
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage to feared or possessed enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage To Feared Or Possessed Enemies +16%

nodes.name: Medium
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits has increased cast speed and costs less mana. | Cast Speed +5%; Mana Efficiency +8%

nodes.name: Eternal Haunt
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits continues to reveal Spirits for a longer duration, but has a longer cooldown. | Reveal Duration (seconds) +1; Cooldown Duration (seconds) +1 (downside)

nodes.name: Sheltering Spirits
nodes.description: You gain Ward whenever a Spirit expires. | Ward Gain Per Spirit +3

nodes.name: Infusing Souls
nodes.description: You have a chance to gain mana whenever a Spirit expires. | Mana Gain Chance 15%; Mana Gained 4

nodes.name: Souls of Rage
nodes.description: Spirits move faster and deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Spirit Movespeed +15%; Damage +8%

nodes.name: Poisoned Minds
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage to poisoned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage To Poisoned Enemies +12%

nodes.name: Locus Mortis
nodes.description: Spirits are now revealed around a target location, rather than around you. Spirits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage +15%

nodes.name: Reap the Damned
nodes.description: Spirits deal more damage to cursed enemies and damned enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage To Cursed Enemies +12%; Damage To Damned Enemies +12%

nodes.name: Song of the Lost Chantry
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits is now a channelled skill, has a much shorter cooldown, and creates Spirits much more frequently. You can regenerate mana while channelling this skill. | Reveal Rate +120%; Cooldown Duration -90%

nodes.name: Spirit Swarm
nodes.description: Wandering Spirits has a shorter cooldown | Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed 10%

nodes.name: Forbidden Pact
nodes.description: Souls deal additional spell damage based on your maximum mana, but fewer Souls are created with each cast. | Spell Damage per 20 Max Mana +1; Extra Projectiles -2 (downside)

nodes.name: Isolation
nodes.description: Souls are significantly larger and deal more hit damage, but only one is created with each cast. | Hit Damage +100%; Size +100%; Soul Limit 1 (downside)

nodes.name: Piercing Gaze
nodes.description: Improves Hungering Souls' base critical strike chance. | Base Crit Chance +3%

nodes.description: The Fissure gains a percentage of your global chance to ignite on hit as ignite chance per second.   Additionally, the Fissure has a base chance to ignite enemies each second. | Your Ignite Chance -> Ignite Chance per Second 100%; Ignite Chance per Second +50%

nodes.name: Falconer's Journey
nodes.description: Your Falcon deals more global damage per character level and per point of Dexterity (both multiplicative with other modifiers). | Falcon Damage per Level +1%; Falcon Damage per Dex +1%

nodes.name: Watchful Eye
nodes.description: Your Falcon now more heavily prioritizes enemies close to you during combat.

nodes.name: Sidekick
nodes.description: Your Falcon now heavily prioritizes enemies close to the target location of your most recent melee, throwing or bow attack.

nodes.name: Agile Prey
nodes.description: Your Falcon deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).  This effect is tripled against moving targets. | Falcon Damage +5%

nodes.name: Rending Talons
nodes.description: A portion of your chance to inflict bleed, poison, shred armor, shred resistances, and slow on hit now also apply to your Falcon's hits. | Ailment Chances -> Falcon Hits 15%

nodes.name: Trained to Hunt
nodes.description: A portion of the highest of your global increased melee damage, increased throwing damage, or increased bow damage now apply to all your Falcon's damage. | Highest Increased Damage -> Falcon Damage 50%

nodes.name: Exposed Weakness
nodes.description: When you use a melee, throwing, or bow attack and critically strike at least one enemy, your Falcon gains a portion of your global melee, throwing, or bow critical strike multiplier respectively for 10 seconds.  This effect can occur at most twice every two second. | Crit Multi -> Falcon Crit Multi Buff after Attack 25%; Buff Duration (seconds) 10

nodes.name: Hunter's Spoils
nodes.description: When your Falcon kills an enemy or hits a boss or rare enemy it restores health and mana to you based on your total attributes. This effect can occur from hits a limited number of times per 3 seconds. | Health Gain per 2 total attributes 1; Mana Gain per 40 total attributes 1; Hit Effect Limit per 3 Seconds 10

nodes.name: Avian Hunter
nodes.description: Aerial Assault deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a shorter cooldown. | Damage +6%; Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed 3%

nodes.name: Skyward Swoop
nodes.description: A portion of Aerial Assault's cooldown is recovered when your Falcon hits an enemy. This effect can occur a limited number of times per 3 seconds. | Remaining Cooldown Recovered On Falcon Hit 6%; Limit per 3 Seconds 10

nodes.name: Refreshing Resolve
nodes.description: Directly using Aerial Assault recovers a portion of your missing mana. | Missing Mana Recovered 3%

nodes.name: Healing Gust
nodes.description: Directly using Aerial Assault recovers a portion of your missing health. | Missing Health Recovered 10%

nodes.name: Rush of the Hunt
nodes.description: Dive Bomb has a shorter cooldown. | Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed 12%

nodes.name: United Assault
nodes.description: You reduce a portion of Dive Bomb's remaining cooldown when you use a throwing or bow attack and hit at least one enemy. | Remaining Cooldown Recovered 6%

nodes.name: Hindering Beak Strike
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits slows enemies and it deals damage in a larger area. | Slow Stacks 1; Area +15%

nodes.name: Flesh Tearing Talons
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits shred enemy physical resistance. | Physical Res Shred Stacks 1

nodes.name: Exsanguinating Strike
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of bleed on the target up to a maximum.  Additionally, it causes all bleed stacks inflicted by you or your Falcon to be consumed to deal their remaining damage instantly. | Hit Damage Per Bleed +1%; Max Damage Bonus 30%

nodes.name: Rushing Wings
nodes.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and it has a shorter delay before the Falcon dives. | Damage +4%; Reduced Delay 18%

nodes.name: Devastating Dive
nodes.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and stuns caused by it last longer, but it has a longer cooldown. | Damage +18%; Stun Duration +18%; Cooldown Duration +18% (downside)

nodes.name: Rending Impact
nodes.description: Dive Bomb's hits cause enemies to bleed. | Bleed Stacks 1

nodes.name: Talon Knives
nodes.description: If you are dual wielding, a portion of the damage specific stats from both of your weapons apply to your Falcon's Dive Bomb. | Stats From Weapons Effectiveness 15%

nodes.name: Gaping Wounds
nodes.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 10% of your increased stun chance. | Ailment Damage Per 10% Increased Stun Chance +1%

nodes.name: Rapid Pursuit
nodes.description: If Dive Bomb hits at least one boss or rare enemy you regain mana and recover a portion of your remaining traversal skills' cooldown. | Mana Gain On Boss Or Rare Hit 3; Traversal Skills Cooldown Recovered 8%

nodes.name: Focused Hunter
nodes.description: Dive Bomb deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and costs less mana. | Damage +4%; Mana Cost -2

nodes.name: Ash Compartment
nodes.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and its hits shred enemy fire resistance. | Damage +5%; Fire Res Shred Stacks 1

nodes.name: Hold This
nodes.description: Whenever you hit an enemy with any melee attack, you attach an Explosive Trap to that enemy.  This effect has a 1.5 second cooldown and attached traps explode after 1 second ignoring arming time or when the enemy it's attached to dies. Enemies cannot have more than 1 trap attached. | Attached Trap Arming Time (seconds) 1; Attach Cooldown (seconds) 1.5

nodes.name: Aspect of the Rabbit
nodes.description: Attached traps deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).  If the enemy that the Explosive Trap is attached to hits you, it now attaches to you instead (but will still only damage enemies). Hitting an enemy then attaches it back to them without changing the delay before exploding.  Additionally, when it explodes, the trap deals 30% more damage for each time it has been passed. | Attached Damage +35%; Trap Damage Per Pass +60%

nodes.name: Trapas
nodes.description: When directly using Explosive Trap, an unconverted Explosive Trap and a trap corresponding to each conversion node you have taken are thrown at the same time. Traps thrown this way are thrown in a small area.  Additionally, Explosive Trap deals less damage in a smaller area (both multiplicative with other modifiers) and cost additional mana. | Damage -30% (downside); Less Area -30% (downside); Mana Cost +3 (downside)

nodes.name: Flash Frozen
nodes.description: Explosive Trap's hits have a chance to chill enemies.  Additionally, Explosive Trap has additional freeze rate per Intelligence. | Chill Stacks 1; Freeze Rate Per Int +1

nodes.name: Freezing Trap
nodes.description: When you directly throw Explosive Trap, its hits always freeze enemies, but it now has a cooldown.  Whenever you freeze an enemy with any skill, a portion of Explosive Trap's remaining cooldown is recovered. | Cooldown (seconds) 15; Remaining Cooldown Recovered On Freeze 10%

nodes.name: Tinkerer's Design
nodes.description: Explosive Trap is now triggered from farther away and deals damage in a larger area. | Trigger Area +10%; Detonation Area +20%

nodes.name: Adaptive Fuse
nodes.description: Particularly fast enemies (with a movement speed above 6 meters per second) trigger Explosive Traps instantly, even if they haven't armed.  Additionally, Explosive Trap's hits deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to moving enemies. | Hit Damage To Moving Enemies +15%

nodes.name: Prepared Demolition
nodes.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a larger area for each second it has existed before detonating up to a maximum. | Damage Bonus Per Second +20%; Area Bonus Per Second +20%; Max Bonus Duration (seconds) 3

nodes.name: Gadgeteer
nodes.description: Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if the arming time is not ignored, but it takes longer for it to arm before it can detonate. | Damage After Full Arming Time +25%; Arming Time (seconds) +0.3 (downside)

nodes.name: Jelkhor's Blueprint
nodes.description: Explosive Trap costs less mana and it has increased throwing attack speed. | Mana Efficiency +8%; Throwing Attack Speed +4%

nodes.name: No Man's Land
nodes.description: Whenever you directly throw Explosive Trap, you now throw traps, up to your maximum number of traps, in a wide area around the target location.  Explosive Trap deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per maximum traps, but it now has a cooldown and costs more mana per maximum trap. | Damage Per Max Trap +4%; Mana Cost Per Max Trap +12% (downside); Cooldown (seconds) 12 (downside)

nodes.name: Minefield
nodes.description: You can now have more active Explosive Traps. | Maximum Traps +1

nodes.name: Clustered Explosives
nodes.description: When you directly use Explosive Trap you throw additional traps, but Explosive Trap costs more mana. | Additional Traps Thrown +1; Mana Cost +6 (downside)

nodes.name: Subtle Sabotage
nodes.description: Explosive Trap costs less mana, but deals less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) in a smaller area. | Mana Cost -12%; Damage -8% (downside); Area -8% (downside)

nodes.name: Blast Rain
nodes.description: You now shoot arrows attached with Explosive Traps up into the air that then drop down around the target location.  Explosive Trap now scales with your bow damage instead of throwing damage and your bow attack speed instead of throwing attack speed.  This requires wielding a bow.

nodes.name: Trap Sprinkler
nodes.description: Whenever an Explosive Trap detonates, it has a chance to drop a fresh Explosive Trap at its location as long as there is an enemy within 6 meters, but Explosive Trap costs more mana. | Trap Drop Chance +10%; Trap Drop Distance (meters) 6; Mana Cost +1 (downside)

nodes.name: Rending Wires
nodes.description: Net's hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed. | Bleed Chance +50%

nodes.name: Advanced Engineering
nodes.description: Net snares enemies in a larger area. | Area +16%

nodes.name: Surprise Snare
nodes.description: Net's hits cannot be dodged.

nodes.name: Tanglewire
nodes.description: Net's hits slows enemies. | Slow Stacks When Free 1

nodes.name: Barbed Net
nodes.description: Net causes enemies to take physical damage over time and causes them to bleed each second. | Bleed Stacks Per Second 1

nodes.name: Trapper's Crescendo
nodes.description: Net deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) scaling with your dodge chance. | Damage Per 1% Dodge Chance +1%

nodes.name: Curved Hooks
nodes.description: Net deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and bleeds that it inflicts last longer. | Damage +10%; Bleed Duration +10%

nodes.name: Bold Throw
nodes.description: You no longer flip back when using Net.

nodes.name: Net Trap
nodes.description: Net now throws a trap that releases a net at a nearby enemy when it triggers.  You can have a maximum of 6 Net Traps active at once and they last up to 30 seconds. | Max Net Traps 6

nodes.name: Server of Tricks
nodes.description: You now throw additional Net traps with each throw, but Net costs additional mana. | Additional Traps Thrown +1; Mana Cost +5 (downside)

nodes.name: Agile Hunter
nodes.description: You jump further when using Net. | Jump Distance +12%

nodes.name: Assault of the Huntress
nodes.description: You now jump forwards when using Net instead of backwards and it is thrown behind you.

nodes.name: Strongly Woven
nodes.description: Net snares enemies for a longer duration. | Duration +10%

nodes.name: Hunters of Heorot
nodes.description: Net's hits chill bosses and rare enemies while other enemies are stunned for a short duration. Additionally, you gain mana for each moving enemy hit.  This effect adds a 10 second cooldown. | Chill Stacks On Bosses And Rares 3; Stun Duration (seconds) 2; Mana Gain 3; Cooldown (seconds) +10 (downside)

nodes.name: Engineering Smarts
nodes.description: Net has a shorter cooldown. | Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed 15%

nodes.name: Entangled Weapons
nodes.description: Netted enemies deal less physical damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Physical Damage From Netted Enemies -12%

nodes.name: Weakening Threads
nodes.description: Net's hits apply frailty to enemies. | Frailty Stacks 1

nodes.name: Thunderous Strikes
nodes.description: Gathering Storm penetrates enemy lightning resistance. | Lightning Penetration +10%

nodes.name: Windfury Blows
nodes.description: Gathering Storm has increased attack speed. | Attack Speed +5%

nodes.name: Seismic Crash
nodes.description: Gathering Storm deals additional melee damage per Strength while wielding a 2 handed weapon. | Melee Damage Per Strength +1

nodes.name: Of Ice and Snow
nodes.description: Gathering Storm's hits have a chance to chill enemies and a higher chance to freeze enemies. | Chill Chance +20%; Freeze Rate +5

nodes.name: Winter Comes
nodes.description: Gathering Storm has a higher chance to freeze enemies per 2 Attunement and it also has additional cold penetration for frostbite per 2 Attunement. | Freeze Rate Multiplier Per 2 Attunement +1%; Frostbite Cold Penetration Per 2 Attunement +1%

nodes.name: Searing Light
nodes.description: Healing Hands now hits enemies within its area of effect, dealing spell fire damage. Added spell damage applies to it at 200% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Bane of Evil
nodes.description: Healing hands deals additional spell damage based on your Increased Healing Effectiveness and on Increased Healing Effectiveness from this tree. | Spell Damage per 20% increased Healing Effectiveness +1

nodes.name: Turn Undead
nodes.description: Healing Hands fears Undead Enemies for 2 to 3 seconds on hit and deals more damage to them (multiplicative with other modifiers).  Healing Hands grants allies 10% less necrotic damage taken (multiplicative with other modifiers) for 10 seconds when cast on them. This buff does not stack. | Damage vs Undead Enemies +10%; Necrotic Damage Taken -10%

nodes.name: Cleric's Wrath
nodes.description: Healing hands deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on the combined levels of your specialised Buff skills. | Damage per Level of Specialised Buff Skills +0.5%

nodes.name: Holy Winds
nodes.description: Healing Hands deals more lightning damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) and when you hit an electrified enemy with Healing Hands it spreads all stacks of your stacks of electrify from that enemy to a number of other enemies within 5 metres. | Lightning Damage Over Time +40%; Targets to Spread Electrify to 1

nodes.name: Seraph Blade
nodes.description: Healing Hands is converted into a melee attack that hits in a wide arc in front of you. It now scales with melee damage instead of spell damage and effects on this tree that granted spell damage now grant melee damage instead.  Healing Hands still heals you, as well as allies within its area of affect.

nodes.name: Prayer of the Fallen
nodes.description: Healing Hands has increased healing effectiveness. This bonus is doubled if there is a dead player within 30 meters. | Increased Healing Effectiveness 25%

nodes.name: Blessed Parish
nodes.description: Healing Hands has an increased area of effect and a lower mana cost. | Area +15%; Mana Cost -2

nodes.name: Purity of Thought
nodes.description: Healing Hands has a lower mana cost. | Mana Cost -5

nodes.name: Divine Barrier
nodes.description: Healing Hands also grants ward to allies based on your Attunement.  If the ally has an effect that causes them to gain ward per second based on their missing health, then it will not heal them, but will provide a percentage of its healing as ward. | Ward per 2 Attunement 1; Healing Conversion 20%

nodes.name: Homeward
nodes.description: If Healing Hands would not affect any allied players at the chosen target location, it is cast centered on you instead.  Healing Hands has increased healing effectiveness. | Increased Healing Effectiveness 18%

nodes.name: Synthesis of Light
nodes.description: Healing Hands also grants ward to allies based on your Increased Healing Effectiveness and on Increased Healing Effectiveness from this tree. | Ward per 10% increased Healing Effectiveness 1

nodes.name: Unbroken Prayer
nodes.description: Healing Hands becomes a channeled ability, casting 4 times per second regardless of cast speed, and draining your mana. | Casts Per Second 4; Mana Cost Per Second 10 (downside)

nodes.name: Guardian's Chant
nodes.description: Healing Hands also grants ward per second for three seconds after being cast on an ally.  The ward per second is equal to a proportion of the ward granted up front by the other nodes on this tree and by items that cause you to grant ward with Healing Hands.  This effect cannot stack multiple times, casting again on the same ally just refreshes the duration. | Upfront Ward gained as Ward per Second 10%; Ward per Second Duration (Seconds) 3

nodes.name: Urgent Healing
nodes.description: Healing Hands restores additional health up front. | Up Front Healing +20

nodes.name: Vow of Restoration
nodes.description: Healing Hands restores additional health over time. This lasts for three seconds just like Healing Hands' inherent healing over time effect. | Additional Healing Per Second +20

nodes.name: Cleric's Hammer
nodes.description: When you directly use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy, you have a chance to cast Healing Hands around the target. This consumes mana based on Healing Hands's mana cost.  Healing Hands restores less up front health when cast indirectly. | Healing Hands Chance on Melee Hit 25%; Healing Hands Mana Consumption 110% (downside); Less Up Front Healing For Indirect Casts -65% (downside)

nodes.name: Hand of Aurelus
nodes.description: When you directly cast Smite, you have a chance to cast Healing Hands around the target location. This consumes 70% of its mana cost. | Healing Hands Chance on Smite Cast 25%

nodes.name: Cloud Voyager
nodes.description: A portion of Healing Hands' remaining cooldown is recovered if you use it to heal an ally other than yourself. This effect can occur once per direct cast of Healing Hands. | Cooldown Recovered on Ally Healed 75%

nodes.name: Sun Shroud
nodes.description: You are immune to damage while moving with Healing Hands.

nodes.name: Virtue of Patience
nodes.description: Healing Hands takes longer to cast, but deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has increased healing effectiveness and a larger area of effect. | Cast Speed -16% (downside); Damage +24%; Increased Healing 24%; Increased Area 16%

nodes.name: Font of Salvation
nodes.description: If you heal an allied player other than yourself that was below half prior to healing, Healing Hands restores them to full health and grants them ward equal to 80% of their max health.  This has no effect on you, nor on minions, nor players that have an effect that causes them to gain ward per second based on their missing health. | Heal to Full Threshold 50%; Health Gained as Ward when Healing to Full 80%

nodes.name: Skyfall
nodes.description: While channelling Healing Hands you also call down a beam from the sky that deals fire damage over time to enemies around the target area and heals allies within its area of effect.  Healing Hands costs additional mana per second while channelling. | Mana Cost Per Second +7 (downside)

nodes.name: Decimating Spike
nodes.description: Heartseeker has additional critical strike chance and its critical strikes deal more damage. | Critical Chance +2%; Critical Multiplier +10%

nodes.name: Bonepiercer
nodes.description: Heartseeker deals more bow damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) after each recurve, up to a maximum. | Bow Damage +4%; Max Damage Bonus Stacks 12

nodes.name: Exposed
nodes.description: Heartseeker's hits have a chance to apply frailty and shred enemy armor, but it no longer seeks new targets when the first target dies. | Frailty Chance +100%; Armor Shred Chance +100%

nodes.name: Against All Odds
nodes.description: Heartseeker's hits cannot be dodged and it deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage +8%

nodes.name: Icy Impaler
nodes.description: Heartseeker's hits have a higher chance to freeze and have a chance to chill enemies. | Freeze Rate +20; Chill Chance +25%

nodes.name: Frozen Splinter
nodes.description: Heartseeker penetrate additional cold resistance scaling with your cold overcapped resistance. | Cold Penetration Per 10% Overcapped Cold Res +1%

nodes.name: Fury of the Hunt
nodes.description: Directly using Heartseeker and hitting at least one enemy grants you frenzy for a short duration.   This effect has a 10 second cooldown. | Frenzy Duration (seconds) 2

nodes.name: Heartdrain
nodes.description: When directly used, Heartseeker arrows have a chance to grant mana and health on hit. | Chance On Hit 25%; Mana Gain 1; Health Gain 10

nodes.name: Swift and Sure
nodes.description: Heartseeker has increased attack speed and costs less mana. | Attack Speed +5%; Mana Efficiency +10%

nodes.name: Blightshot
nodes.description: Heartseeker's hits have a chance to poison enemies and poison it inflicts last longer. | Poison Chance +25%; Poison Duration +10%

nodes.name: Heartrender
nodes.description: Heartseeker's hits have a chance to cause enemies to bleed and bleed it inflicts penetrate enemy physical resistance. | Bleed Chance +25%; Physical Penetration With Bleed +10%

nodes.name: Seeping Wounds
nodes.description: Heartseeker deals more ailment damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) after each recurve, up to a maximum. | Damage Over Time +5%; Max Damage Bonus Stacks 8

nodes.name: Relentless Volley
nodes.description: Heartseeker has additional charges. | Additional Charges +1

nodes.name: Deep Rust
nodes.description: Armor shred chance from all sources is converted to poison chance.

nodes.name: Gravecrawler
nodes.description: Flay deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), and has a chance to chill on hit. | Damage +8%; Chill Chance +25%

nodes.name: Plasma Fountain
nodes.description: Every second melee attack with Flay which hits a boss or rare enemy has a chance to trigger a Blood Eruption. | Blood Eruption Chance Every Second Attack +34#; Blood Eruption Damage +8%

nodes.name: Decree of Slaughter
nodes.description: Flay deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers), doubled against low life enemies. | Hit Damage +8%

nodes.name: Scent of Death
nodes.description: Enemies hit by Flay are inflicted with Marked for Death for a duration, and Flay hits instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health). | Marked For Death Duration (seconds) 1; Kill Threshold 3%

nodes.name: Trepidation Blade
nodes.description: While using a dagger, Flay has increased attack speed. | Attack Speed With a Dagger 16%

nodes.name: Spirit Stride
nodes.description: When you directly use Flay and hit at least one enemy, you have a chance to gain Haste for 2 seconds. This chance is tripled if Flay is a traversal skill.  Flay's Spirit Step can move you from a further distance. | Haste Chance 12%; Increased Spirit Step Maximum Distance 20%

nodes.name: Transference
nodes.description: Hitting a boss or rare enemy with Flay's melee attack transfers your active Aura of Decay to them for up to 6 seconds.  While the aura is attached to an enemy, you can move away from it to avoid the self-inflicted ailments.

nodes.name: Thirst of Dread
nodes.description: Flay has increased area of effect and additional spell damage. These effects are doubled if there is a bleeding enemy within 15 meters. | Area +15%; Spell Damage +5; Doubled with a Bleeding Enemy Within Distance (meters) 15

nodes.name: Bloodsoaked Blade
nodes.description: A percentage of the melee damage on your equipped axes or daggers is also applied as spell damage for the Blood Eruption. | Melee Damage On Axes Or Daggers As Spell Damage 25%

nodes.name: Deadly Plot
nodes.description: Flay and all skills triggered by its skill tree deal more spell damage per 100 maximum mana.  Flay has additional mana cost. | Spell Damage per 100 Maximum Mana +5%; Mana Cost +2 (downside)

nodes.name: Go For The Throat
nodes.description: Flay has additional critical strike chance, and leeches a percentage of damage dealt as health. | Critical Strike Chance +2%; Damage Leeched as Health 0.5%

nodes.name: Marrow Gnawer
nodes.description: Flay has additional critical strike multiplier. Critically hitting at least one enemy with Flay's melee attack has a chance to release Marrow Shards towards another nearby enemy within 6 meters. | Critical Strike Multiplier +15%; Chance To Cast Marrow Shards 25%

nodes.name: Misfortune
nodes.description: Blood Eruption has increased area of effect and deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) for each of your curses that were on the enemy. | Blood Eruption Increased Area per Curse +8%; Blood Eruption Hit Damage per Curse +8%

nodes.name: Spirit Geyser
nodes.description: Blood Eruption consumes mana to release a Wandering Spirit. This effect can trigger a limited number of times per 4 seconds. | Limit per 4 Seconds 2; Mana Consumed 2 (downside)

nodes.name: Blood Waltz
nodes.description: Blood Eruption spreads all bleeds on that enemy to a limited amount of other enemies within its range. | Maximum Spreads 1

nodes.name: Hemorrhage
nodes.description: Flay has a chance to inflict bleed on hit, and bleeds inflicted by Flay have increased duration. | Bleed Chance +25%; Bleed Duration +10%

nodes.name: Chill of the Grave
nodes.description: Flay deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to chilled or frozen enemies.  Flay has additional freeze rate per active skeleton or bone golem. | Hit Damage to Chilled or Frozen +10%; Freeze Rate per Skeleton or Golem +10

nodes.name: Prince of Pain
nodes.description: If you directly use Flay and hit at least one enemy, but do not hit a boss or rare enemy, a spectral copy of Flay strikes a random nearby boss or rare enemy.

nodes.name: Spectral Nightmare
nodes.description: Directly using Flay and hitting at least one enemy has a chance to trigger a spectral copy of Flay against a nearby enemy if one would not be triggered otherwise.  Spectral copies of Flay have increased area of effect. | Spectral Flay Chance 10%; Spectral Flay Increased Area +20%

nodes.name: Occult Offerings
nodes.description: Directly using Flay consumes a percentage of your current health and ward. Flay gains additional melee damage per 30 health consumed and additional spell damage per 30 ward consumed by this effect, up to a limited amount of each. | Percent of Current Health and Ward Consumed 9% (downside); Melee Damage per 30 Health Consumed +1; Spell Damage per 30 Ward Consumed +1; Maximum Added Damage from Consumption +12

nodes.name: Macabre Dance
nodes.description: Flay deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).  Directly using Flay and hitting at least one enemy reduces the remaining cooldown of Reaper Form by a percentage. This can occur a limited number of times per use of Reaper Form or Reap. | Melee Damage +8%; Remaining Cooldown Recovered 6%; Limit per Use of Reaper Form or Reap 3

nodes.name: Dismember
nodes.description: Flay has a chance to inflict bleed on hit, and Flay deals more damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).  Flay has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Bleed Chance +25%; Damage Over Time +15%; Attack Speed -3% (downside)

nodes.name: Spirit Leap
nodes.description: Flay is now a traversal skill with a cooldown. The Spirit Step can move you from a much further distance and no longer requires a target. | Maximum Spirit Step Distance (meters) 12; Cooldown (seconds) 5

nodes.name: Doom Whisperer
nodes.description: The Spirit Step is removed, and Flay has increased attack speed. | Attack Speed 10%

nodes.name: Exquisite Blood
nodes.description: Flay's melee attack is removed. Flay becomes a spell that directly creates the Blood Eruption, and is now affected by cast speed instead of attack speed.  Any modifiers to Flay's attack speed in its skill tree instead apply to cast speed.

nodes.name: Soul Ripper
nodes.description: Flay's base damage is converted to necrotic. Consequently this damage scales with increases to necrotic damage, but not increases to physical damage.  Bleed chance from all sources is converted to damned chance.

nodes.name: Hew
nodes.description: Flay deals more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a lower mana cost.  Flay has less attack speed (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Melee Damage +12%; Mana Cost -1; Attack Speed -3% (downside)

nodes.name: Intensity
nodes.description: Shadow Rend deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage +8%

nodes.name: Heavy Shadows
nodes.description: Shadow Rend deals more damage, but has less attack speed (both multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage +12%; Attack Speed -3% (downside)

nodes.name: Betrayal of Flesh
nodes.description: The manifested shadow chooses a random enemy to dash toward, ignoring your targeted direction. It can target enemies that are further away. | Shadow Target Acquisition Distance +40%

nodes.name: Jagged Shadows
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has additional chance to inflict bleed on hit, doubled for the shadow's attack. | Bleed Chance, Doubled for Shadow Attack +25%

nodes.name: Precision
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has additional critical strike chance. | Critical Chance +2%

nodes.name: Illumination
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has additional chance to shock enemies on hit, and it has additional critical strike multiplier per shock on the enemy. | Shock Chance +50%; Critical Multiplier per Shock +2%

nodes.name: Eternal Darkness
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has additional critical strike multiplier, and additional chance to blind enemies on hit. | Critical Multiplier +15%; Blind Chance +34#

nodes.name: Hidden Blades
nodes.description: The shadow's attack has a chance to inflict Shadow Daggers on hit. | Shadow Daggers Chance for Shadow Attack +50%

nodes.name: Ghastly Wounds
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has a chance to inflict frailty and slow on hit. | Frailty Chance +34#; Slow Chance +34#

nodes.name: Exposed Weakness
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has additional physical penetration per unique negative ailment on the enemy, up to 5. | Physical Penetration per Unique Negative Ailment +3%; Max Unique Negative Ailments Considered 5

nodes.name: Moon Frenzy
nodes.description: Directly using Shadow Rend grants Frenzy for a duration, and Shadow Rend deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while you have frenzy. | Frenzy Duration (seconds) 1; Damage with Frenzy +5%

nodes.name: Energy Flow
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has increased attack speed and a lower mana cost. | Attack Speed +6%; Mana Cost -1

nodes.name: Breaking Force
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has increased melee area for the shadow's attack.  The shadow's attack has a chance to shred armor on hit, doubled with a bow. | Melee Area for Shadow Attack +12%; Armor Shred Chance for Shadow Attack, Doubled with Bow +34#

nodes.name: Night's Approach
nodes.description: Shadow Rend no longer moves you. The manifested shadow dashes forward 5 meters in the targeted direction before attacking, and will choose a target within range upon arriving.

nodes.name: Hidden Strength
nodes.description: Directly using Shadow Rend consumes all shadows. It restores mana if you consume at least 1 shadow.  For each shadow consumed after the first, it gains more damage and more melee area (both multiplicative with other modifiers). | Mana Restored from First Shadow Consumed 2; Damage from Subsequent Shadows Consumed +20%; Melee Area from Subsequent Shadows Consumed +10%

nodes.name: Shadow Rush
nodes.description: Shadow Rend is now a traversal skill. You dash up to 7 meters forward after manifesting the shadow.  Shadow Rend deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a cooldown. | Damage +50%; Cooldown (seconds) 3

nodes.name: Dusklight
nodes.description: Shadow Rend's base physical damage is converted to lightning damage. Consequently this damage scales with increases to lightning damage, but not increases to physical damage.

nodes.name: Darkened Blood
nodes.description: Bleed chance from all sources is converted to poison chance for Shadow Rend.  Shadow Rend deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per poison on the enemy, up to 30. | Hit Damage per Poison, up to 30 +1%

nodes.name: Pursuit
nodes.description: Shadow Rend deals more bow damage to damaged enemies. When used with a bow, Shadow Rend moves you forwards instead of backwards. | Bow Damage to Damaged Enemies +6%

nodes.name: Flourish
nodes.description: Shadow Rend has an additional charge. | Additional Charges +1

nodes.name: Efficient Manufacturing
nodes.description: Bladestorms have an increased duration and lower mana cost. | Duration +15%; Mana Cost -1

nodes.name: Razorain
nodes.description: Directly casting Bladestorm throws up to your maximum number of Bladestorms in a spread in front of you, but Bladestorm has additional mana cost. | Mana Cost +10 (downside)

nodes.name: Hurricane
nodes.description: Bladestorms have increased movement speed based on your dexterity. | Bladestorm Movement Speed per 1 Dexterity +1%

nodes.name: High Carbon Steel
nodes.description: Bladestorms have a chance to shred armor on hit. | Armor Shred Chance +25%

nodes.name: Strength of Arms
nodes.description: Bladestorm has increased area with a two handed melee weapon or bow equipped.  Bladestorm has increased hit rate while dual wielding. | Area with Two Handed Melee Weapon or Bow +25%; Hit Rate while Dual Wielding +6%

nodes.name: Open the Armory
nodes.description: Bladestorm has additional critical strike chance per equipped dagger, chance to inflict bleed on hit per equipped one handed sword, and additional critical strike multiplier with a two handed sword. | Critical Chance per Dagger +2%; Bleed Chance per One Handed Sword +20%; Critical Multiplier with Two Handed Sword +30%

nodes.name: Longsword Slash
nodes.description: Bladestorm has increased area and increased attack speed. | Area +15%; Attack Speed +8%

nodes.name: Steelshaper's Grit
nodes.description: Bladestorm has additional critical strike chance. | Critical Chance +2%

nodes.name: Heavy Weapon
nodes.description: Bladestorm deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). | Damage +8%

nodes.name: Tempered Steel
nodes.description: Bladestorm deals more hit damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and has a lower mana cost. | Hit Damage +4%; Mana Cost -1

nodes.name: Sawtooth Blade
nodes.description: Bladestorm has a chance to inflict bleed on hit. | Bleed Chance +25%

nodes.name: Low Slash
nodes.description: Bladestorm has a chance to slow enemies on hit. | Slow Chance +34%

nodes.name: Magnetic Grip
nodes.description: Bladestorm slowly seeks out enemies.

nodes.name: Alloy Animation
nodes.description: Bladestorms have more movement speed (multiplicative with other modifiers), and multiple Bladestorms can now hit the same target simultaneously.  Bladestorm has increased mana cost and duration. Your maximum number of Bladestorms is reduced. | Bladestorm Movement Speed +100%; Bladestorm Duration +20%; Max Bladestorms -1 (downside); Mana Cost +50% (downside)

nodes.name: Frostblade
nodes.description: Bladestorm's base physical damage is converted to cold. Consequently this damage scales with increases to cold, but not increases to physical damage.  Bleed chance and poison chance from all sources is converted to frostbite chance. | Freeze Rate 60
